article_meta.title: close Video American Accountability Foundation president releases Education Department 'watch list,' explains why Trump

reasoning: Multiple attribution rule violations: the model flagged quoted/attributed source language (e.g., 'Book Ban Hoax', 'meritless', 'dubious legal theory') as author bias. It did correctly flag 'so-called book bans' and a defensible omission, but most items were invalid due to attribution. Missed only minor additional biases.

custom_reasoning.attribution_rule_compliance: Three of five items come from quoted/attributed DOE language and should not have been flagged.
custom_reasoning.false_positive_rate: Majority of flagged items are not genuine author-level bias because they are quotes or clearly attributed to DOE.
custom_reasoning.false_negative_rate: Potential missed bias includes the unquoted characterization of removed materials as 'age-inappropriate, sexually explicit or obscene' in the author’s prose; otherwise main author-level bias ('so-called') was caught.
custom_reasoning.bias_type_accuracy: For the valid items, labels are appropriate (Word Choice for 'so-called'; Bias by Omission for the one-sided sourcing).
